title: Closing apps
drDigitalIntro: To close an app completely, press Command+Q (or Control+Q), or click the red X to shut it down. To just move a window out of your way instead, minimize it by clicking the yellow minus button next to the red X.
drDigitalSuccess: Red X to close, yellow minus to tuck it away — you've got it!
drDigitalHint: Open an app in the playground and try the red X and the minus button, then click Continue.
